list.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs voices list` to list available voices. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--limit/-l`, `--filter/-f`, `--properties/-p`.

get.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs voices get` to get metadata for a voice. Required arguments: `VOICE_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

settings.help: Get stored settings for a voice.
settings.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs voices settings` to get stored settings for a voice. Required arguments: `VOICE_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

voices.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs voices` for manage elevenlabs voices. Available subcommands here are `list`, `get`, `settings`.

list.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs models list` to list available models. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--limit/-l`, `--filter/-f`, `--properties/-p`.

get.help: Get a model from the model list by ID.
get.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs models get` to get a model from the model list by ID. Required arguments: `MODEL_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

models.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs models` for manage elevenlabs models. Available subcommands here are `list`, `get`.

create.help: Convert text into speech and write the audio file.

options.name: --pronunciation-dictionary
options.help: Pronunciation dictionary locator pronunciation_dictionary_id:version_id. Repeat up to 3 times

create.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs speech create` to convert text into speech and write the audio file. Required arguments: `VOICE_ID`, `TEXT`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

speech.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs speech` for generate speech audio. Available subcommands here are `create`.

list.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries list` to list pronunciation dictionaries. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--limit/-l`, `--filter/-f`, `--properties/-p`.

get.help: PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID Get pronunciation dictionary metadata and latest rules.
get.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries get` to pRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID Get pronunciation dictionary metadata and latest rules. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

create-from-rules.help: [OPTIONS] Create a pronunciation dictionary from alias and phoneme rules.

options.name: --alias-rule
options.help: Alias rule in string_to_replace=alias form. Repeat for multiple rules

options.name: --phoneme-rule
options.help: Phoneme rule in string_to_replace|alphabet|phoneme form. Repeat for multiple rules

create-from-rules.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries create-from-rules` to [OPTIONS] Create a pronunciation dictionary from alias and phoneme rules. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

create-from-file.help: [OPTIONS] Create a pronunciation dictionary from a PLS lexicon file.
create-from-file.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries create-from-file` to [OPTIONS] Create a pronunciation dictionary from a PLS lexicon file. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

update.help: CTIONARY_ID Update pronunciation dictionary metadata without changing its version.
update.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries update` to cTIONARY_ID Update pronunciation dictionary metadata without changing its version. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

set-rules.help: _DICTIONARY_ID Replace all rules in a pronunciation dictionary.

options.name: --alias-rule
options.help: Alias rule in string_to_replace=alias form. Repeat for multiple rules

options.name: --phoneme-rule
options.help: Phoneme rule in string_to_replace|alphabet|phoneme form. Repeat for multiple rules

set-rules.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries set-rules` to _DICTIONARY_ID Replace all rules in a pronunciation dictionary. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

add-rules.help: _DICTIONARY_ID Add or replace rules in a pronunciation dictionary.

options.name: --alias-rule
options.help: Alias rule in string_to_replace=alias form. Repeat for multiple rules

options.name: --phoneme-rule
options.help: Phoneme rule in string_to_replace|alphabet|phoneme form. Repeat for multiple rules

add-rules.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries add-rules` to _DICTIONARY_ID Add or replace rules in a pronunciation dictionary. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

remove-rules.help: ION_DICTIONARY_ID Remove rules from a pronunciation dictionary.
remove-rules.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries remove-rules` to iON_DICTIONARY_ID Remove rules from a pronunciation dictionary. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

download.help: DICTIONARY_ID VERSION_ID Download a pronunciation dictionary version as a PLS file.

options.name: --output
options.help: Path to write the PLS file

download.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries download` to dICTIONARY_ID VERSION_ID Download a pronunciation dictionary version as a PLS file. Required arguments: `PRONUNCIATION_DICTIONARY_ID`, `VERSION_ID`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

pronunciation-dictionaries.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries` for manage pronunciation dictionaries. Available subcommands here are `list`, `get`, `create-from-rules`, `create-from-file`, `update`, `set-rules`, `add-rules`, `remove-rules`, `download`.

subscription.help: Get the current user subscription and quota state.
subscription.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs user subscription` to get the current user subscription and quota state. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--properties/-p`.

user.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs user` for inspect elevenlabs user account data. Available subcommands here are `subscription`.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth login` to configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. Common options: `--profile/-p`, `--force/-F`, `--credential-type/-c`.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth logout` to clear stored credentials. Common options: `--profile/-p`.

status.help: Check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test``.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth status` to check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test``. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--profile/-p`.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth test` to test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--profile/-p`.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth profiles list` to list all profiles and show which is the default. Common options: `--table/-t`, `--limit/-l`, `--filter/-f`, `--properties/-p`.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth profiles get` to get details for a specific profile. Required arguments: `NAME`. Common options: `--table/-t`.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth profiles create` to create a new profile from .env.example template. Required arguments: `NAME`.

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth profiles set-default` to set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). Required arguments: `NAME`.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs auth profiles delete` to delete a profile and its data. Required arguments: `NAME`. Common options: `--force/-F`.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs auth profiles` for manage authentication profiles. Available subcommands here are `list`, `get`, `create`, `set-default`, `delete`.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs auth` for manage elevenlabs authentication. Available subcommands here are `login`, `logout`, `status`, `test`, `profiles`.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Run `elevenlabs cache clear` to remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `elevenlabs cache` for manage response cache. Available subcommands here are `clear`.

usage_instructions: Use for cli interface for elevenlabs api. Commands follow `elevenlabs <group> <action>`. Primary groups here are `elevenlabs voices`, `elevenlabs models`, `elevenlabs speech`, `elevenlabs pronunciation-dictionaries`, `elevenlabs user`, `elevenlabs auth`, `elevenlabs cache`.
